scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/renderer && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html
scripts.test: rm -rf .test-dist && tsc --module CommonJS --target ES2022 --moduleResolution Node --esModuleInterop --strict --skipLibCheck --types node --outDir .test-dist tests/smoke/app_boot.test.ts src/main/main.ts src/shared/types.ts && node --test .test-dist/tests/smoke/app_boot.test.js
